title: agelanthus microphyllus
intro:
Agelanthus microphyllus is a species of flowering plant in the family Loranthaceae, commonly known as the mistletoe or a type of parasitic plant that grows on Acacia trees in Africa.

This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms associated with stomach issues.

The health benefits of Agelanthus microphyllus include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations.

Agelanthus microphyllus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine in Africa.
